title: Why AI could finally make India a product nation
description: India has a unique chance to lead in Artificial Intelligence. Leveraging its digital infrastructure and talent, the nation can develop and deploy AI solutions. This will boost sectors like agriculture, healthcare, and education. India must invest in its own AI capabilities to ensure future technological leadership and create new opportunities for its workforce.
